speaker: Diederich
text: Argo...

speaker: Argo
text: Professor Derich. Long time no see. *sigh*

speaker: Professor Derich
text: “Professor Derich stands among the students in the lounge.”
He looks at me and ruffles my head.

speaker: Diederich
text: ...Doesn’t look like you got hurt.

speaker: Argo
text: Nope, I didn’t.

speaker: Diederich
text: I see...
He lets out a sigh of relief when he sees I’m okay.

speaker: Diederich
text: ...I heard you saved Theo’s life. I knew you were no ordinary person.

speaker: Argo
text: I just did what I could.

speaker: Diederich
text: ...I’m sorry, Argo. I coulda kept you from goin' through all that had I went with you.

speaker: Argo
text: W–What are you talking about? It’s not your fault. *sigh*

speaker: Diederich
text: No, I was the one who took you guys out to sea...

speaker: Argo
text: It was a freak accident. Besides, we got back safely. *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: None of it was your fault! Don’t let it get to you, professor!

speaker: Diederich
text: "I don't understand why you’re here." *sigh*

speaker: Diederich
text: Thank you, Argo.

speaker: Diederich
text: 'I’m just… so damn proud of you.’*

speaker: Argo
text: Ehehe.

speaker: Unknown
text: Just hearing him say that makes everything worth it…
Diederich's affection went up!
